title: Classification and Application of Linear Nonstationary Models
description: A flowchart showing the decision process for identifying, transforming, and modeling nonstationary time series data using linear models like ARIMA.
relationships: Original Series is made stationary through Differencing (d) to create Transformed Series
An ARMA(p,q) model is fitted to the Transformed Series
The complete ARIMA(p,d,q) model integrates differencing and ARMA to produce a final forecast
